channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: How to make the complex world of skincare easy
item.description: NPR's Life Kit breaks down what you really need to know about skincare.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Life Kit breaks down what you really need to know about skincare.

item.title: What we can learn from the unique smell of wildfire smoke
item.description: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with Derek Mallia, professor University of Utah's Department of Atmospheric Sciences, about why wildfire smoke in the northeast has a distinctive smell.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with Derek Mallia, professor University of Utah's Department of Atmospheric Sciences, about why wildfire smoke in the northeast has a distinctive smell.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma

item.title: Former U.S. soccer phenom Jozy Altidore finds broadcast stardom on Telemundo
item.description: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with Telemundo's Jozy Altidore about the Spanish language broadcaster's ability to reach wide audiences with their World Cup coverage, even across language barriers.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Adrian Ma speaks with Telemundo's Jozy Altidore about the Spanish language broadcaster's ability to reach wide audiences with their World Cup coverage, even across language barriers.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma

item.title: ProPublica's revelations on the FCC and Paramount-Warner Bros. deal
item.description: Reporting from ProPublica show that some FCC officials in charge of overseeing the multi-billion dollar deal for Paramount Skydance to acquire Warner Brothers Discover may have a conflict of interest.
item.content:encoded: Reporting from ProPublica show that some FCC officials in charge of overseeing the multi-billion dollar deal for Paramount Skydance to acquire Warner Brothers Discover may have a conflict of interest.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma

item.title: We love you, Don Gonyea: Veteran NPR correspondent hangs up his mic after 4 decades
item.description: NPR's Don Gonyea's has retired after over 40 years. His friends and colleagues remember their favorite moments from his storied career.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Don Gonyea's has retired after over 40 years. His friends and colleagues remember their favorite moments from his storied career.
item.dc:creator: Scott Detrow

item.title: A reporter's take on putting people at the center of stories about the economy
item.description: NPR's Stephen Bisaha breaks down how he reports on the economy, looking at the real lives behind numbers.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Stephen Bisaha breaks down how he reports on the economy, looking at the real lives behind numbers.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma

item.title: Two American service members killed in Jordan amid escalating war with Iran
item.description: Two U.S. service members in Jordan have been confirmed killed while one is missing in an escalating conflict with Iran. Iran's supreme leader warns Washington of "unforgettable lessons" to come.
item.content:encoded: Two U.S. service members in Jordan have been confirmed killed while one is missing in an escalating conflict with Iran. Iran's supreme leader warns Washington of "unforgettable lessons" to come.
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng

item.title: Ex-wife says ICE agent who killed man in Maine had racist beliefs, violent tendencies
item.description: Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brouillette, as the officer who fatally shot Joan Sebastián Durán Guerrero in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday. She said she learned he was the officer responsible when he called her on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded:
Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brouillette, as the officer who fatally shot Joan Sebastián Durán Guerrero in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday. She said she learned he was the officer responsible when he called her on Wednesday.

(Image credit: Yuki Iwamura)
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Romo

item.title: Headers at the World Cup
item.description: We look at a new soccer study that says "header" goals are becoming less frequent -- but more accurate -- in FIFA World Cup tournaments.
item.content:encoded: We look at a new soccer study that says "header" goals are becoming less frequent -- but more accurate -- in FIFA World Cup tournaments.
item.dc:creator: Zephyr Weinreich

item.title: Japan revises law on royals, keeps blocking women from throne
item.description: Japan has revised its laws to prevent the world's oldest hereditary monarchy from running out of heirs. But they have left in place a ban on female emperors, an idea which most Japanese support.
item.content:encoded: Japan has revised its laws to prevent the world's oldest hereditary monarchy from running out of heirs. But they have left in place a ban on female emperors, an idea which most Japanese support.
item.dc:creator: Anthony Kuhn
